mapper.select: SELECT * FROM institution_leader WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM institution_leader WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId} AND confirmed = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM institution_leader WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO institution_leader (institution_id, user_id, confirmed) VALUES (#{institutionId}, #{userId}, #{confirmed})

INSERT INTO institution_leader (institution_id, user_id, confirmed) VALUES
(#{item.institutionId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.confirmed})
mapper.update: UPDATE institution_leader SET confirmed=#{confirmed}, confirmed_at=NOW() WHERE institution_id=#{institutionId} AND user_id=#{userId}
